sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 89:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 89:1
items.html: When the light of Malchut rose to the vessel of Hochma, a distance of three degrees was made between the light and the vessel, and the vessel was darkened, and then it was completed. (Item 17, and Inner Light there)
